overview: Mini wireless Cardiovascular ultrasound, multipurpose dual head linear+cardiac Ultrasound probe can provide you with HD heart images. The C10XL, as a kind of wifi ultrasound probe, is a combination of two probes, one side of the phased array probe and the other side of the line array probe.

specs.label: Imaging modes
specs.value: B, B/M, Color Doppler, PW, PDI, B+Color+PW

specs.label: Features
specs.value: Dual screen display, auto vessel flow measurement, measure magnify, full-screen imaging, 8 TGC, and 10 presets/body marks

features: Compatible with Android, iOS, and Windows
Suitable for Cardiac, MSK, Nerve, Thyroid, Vascular, Abdomen, OB/GYN, Emergency, and Clinical applications
Built-in 2800mAh battery with USB & wireless charging
Supports DICOM, report editing/printing, image & video saving/sharing
Portable lightweight design for bedside and emergency use
